structured_payload_candidate.title: Active Endpoints Based on Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The active endpoints (cooling maximum and minimum) for the primary airflow setpoint are determined by the Zone Group mode according to Table 5.7.4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Group mode changes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set cooling maximum and minimum airflow endpoints as per the table.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figures 5.7.5 -1 and 5.7.5 -2 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group  the zone is a part of (see Table 5.7.4). Table 5.7.4 Endpoints  as a Function of Zone Group  Mode Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0 Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0

evidence_quote: Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figures 5.7.5 -1 and 5.7.5 -2 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group  the zone is a part of (see Table 5.7.4). Table 5.7.4 Endpoints  as a Function of Zone Group  Mode Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0 Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Airflow Setpoint in Cooling State
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is Cooling, map cooling-loop output to primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature is above room temperature, cap the setpoint at the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling-loop output linearly from minimum to cooling maximum endpoint. If SAT > room temperature, limit to minimum endpoint. Turn heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The cooling -loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint  from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint . 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint . b. Heating coil is OFF.

evidence_quote: a. The cooling -loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint  from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint . 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint . b. Heating coil is OFF.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Airflow Setpoint in Deadband State
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is Deadband, set primary airflow setpoint to the minimum endpoint and turn the heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Deadband.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set primary airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint. Heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The primary ai rflow setpoint  shall be the minimum endpoint . b.  Heating coil is OFF.

evidence_quote: a. The primary ai rflow setpoint  shall be the minimum endpoint . b.  Heating coil is OFF.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating State Operation - Primary Airflow and Discharge Temperature Reset
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is Heating, primary airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint. The heating-loop output resets the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT to a maximum of MaxΔT above the heating setpoint. The heating coil modulates to maintain DAT at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set primary airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint. Reset DAT from AHU SAT setpoint up to MaxΔT above space heating setpoint as heating-loop output increases. Modulate heating coil to maintain DAT at setpoint. Directly controlling heat from zone temperature control loop is not acceptable.
configurable_values: MaxΔT (zone maximum DAT above heating setpoint)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. b. As the heating -loop output increases from 0 % to 100%, it shall reset the discharge temperatur e from the current AHU SAT setpoint  to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint . c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint . (Directly controlling heat off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

evidence_quote: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. b. As the heating -loop output increases from 0 % to 100%, it shall reset the discharge temperatur e from the current AHU SAT setpoint  to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint . c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint . (Directly controlling heat off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV Damper Modulation
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured primary airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any time the zone is active (damper control loop enabled).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate VAV damper to track the active primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured primary airflow at setpoint .

evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured primary airflow at setpoint .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Parallel Fan Control Logic
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan runs whenever Zone State is heating. In Deadband and Cooling, fan runs based on primary airflow compared to ventilation minimum: if using ASHRAE 62.1, fan runs when primary airflow < Voz for 1 minute and shuts off when above Voz by 10% for 3 minutes; if using Title 24, fan runs when primary airflow < Zone-Abs-OA-min for 1 minute and shuts off when above that by 10% for 3 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State changes; primary airflow level relative to Voz or Zone-Abs-OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Fan ON when heating. In Deadband/Cooling: fan ON when airflow < Voz (or Zone-Abs-OA-min) after 1 min delay; fan OFF when airflow > setpoint +10% after 3 min delay.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. Fan shall run whenever Zone State  is heating . b. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1 -2016, the fan shall run in Deadband and Cooling when the p rimary air volume is less than Voz for 1 minute and shall shut off when primary air volume is above Voz by 10% for 3 minutes. c. If ventilation is according to California Title 24, the fan shall run in Deadband and Cooling when the primary air volume is less than Zone -Abs-OA-min for 1 minute, and shall shut off when primary air volume is above Zone -Abs-OA-min by 10% for 3 minutes.

evidence_quote: a. Fan shall run whenever Zone State  is heating . b. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1 -2016, the fan shall run in Deadband and Cooling when the p rimary air volume is less than Voz for 1 minute and shall shut off when primary air volume is above Voz by 10% for 3 minutes. c. If ventilation is according to California Title 24, the fan shall run in Deadband and Cooling when the primary air volume is less than Zone -Abs-OA-min for 1 minute, and shall shut off when primary air volume is above Zone -Abs-OA-min by 10% for 3 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarm (Level 4)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of active primary airflow setpoint for 10 minutes and setpoint > 0.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 min while setpoint > 0.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarm (Level 3)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of active primary airflow setpoint for 10 minutes and setpoint > 0.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 min while setpoint > 0.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Zones with Zero Importance
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low primary airflow alarms for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R  control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R  control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Discharge Air Temperature Alarm (Level 4)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON and the DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating hot-water plant ON, DAT < setpoint - 8.3°C (15°F) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: DAT < setpoint - 8.3°C (15°F) for 10 min with heating plant ON.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: a. If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Discharge Air Temperature Alarm (Level 3)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON and the DAT is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating hot-water plant ON, DAT < setpoint - 17°C (30°F) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: DAT < setpoint - 17°C (30°F) for 10 min with heating plant ON.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: b. If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low DAT Alarm Suppression for Zones with Zero Importance (HW Reset)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its hot-water reset T&R control loop, low-DAT alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for hot-water reset T&R loop.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low-DAT alarms for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Secti on 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its hot-water  reset T&R  control loop, low -DAT  alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Secti on 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its hot-water  reset T&R  control loop, low -DAT  alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Alarm - Commanded On but Status Off
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If fan status input differs from output command after 15 seconds of a change, and commanded on but status off, generate a Level 2 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan commanded on, status off for 15 seconds after command change.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Commanded on, status off for 15 sec after change.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Fan alarm is indicated by the status input being diffe rent from the output command after a period of 15 seconds after a change in output status. a. Commanded on, status off: Level 2

evidence_quote: Fan alarm is indicated by the status input being diffe rent from the output command after a period of 15 seconds after a change in output status. a. Commanded on, status off: Level 2

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Alarm - Commanded Off but Status On
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If fan commanded off but the status is on after 15 seconds of a change, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan commanded off, status on for 15 seconds after command change.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Commanded off, status on for 15 sec after change.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. Commanded off, status on: Level 4

evidence_quote: b. Commanded off, status on: Level 4

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Fault
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan is OFF and the airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan OFF, airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading > max(10% Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 min with fan OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is abo ve the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 30 minutes , generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is abo ve the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 30 minutes , generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position is 0%, airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position = 0%, airflow > max(10% Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 min, fan proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper closed (0%), airflow > max(10% Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 min with fan ON.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Heating Valve Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If valve position is 0% for 15 minutes, DAT is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and the fan is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Valve position = 0% for 15 min, DAT > AHU SAT + 3°C (5°F), fan proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Heating valve closed (0%) for 15 min, DAT > AHU SAT + 3°C (5°F), fan ON.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the valve position is 0% for 15 minutes, DAT  is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the valve position is 0% for 15 minutes, DAT  is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Override Switches
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, to Vcool-max, to Vmin, force damper full closed/open, force heating to OFF/closed, turn fan ON/OFF, and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Commissioning/testing activity.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify the presence and functionality of the override switches.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero , b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max, c. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vmin , d. force  damper full closed/open , e. force  heating to OFF/closed , f. turn fan ON/OFF, and g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero , b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max, c. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vmin , d. force  damper full closed/open , e. force  heating to OFF/closed , f. turn fan ON/OFF, and g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Designer Ventilation Sum Requirement
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The designer must ensure that the sum of the indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint meets Standard 62.1 requirements.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Design phase.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The designer must ensure that the sum of the indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint  meet Standard 62.1 requirements.

evidence_quote: The designer must ensure that the sum of the indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint  meet Standard 62.1 requirements.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Alarm Threshold Determination
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The constant value thresholds (10% of cooling maximum airflow or 50 cfm) for airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter accuracy; the value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: When configuring alarm thresholds.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set thresholds based on minimum accuracy of the measurement hardware.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow.  The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter comb ination.

evidence_quote: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow.  The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter comb ination.
